messages.content: You are a function calling AI model. Check inventory for SKU GLV-884 in warehouse WH-SYD-02.

Quote freight from MEL-DC1 to BNE-DC4 for 742.5 kg, then book pickup at MEL-DC1 on 2026-06-03 with ops@example.test as the contact.

You are a function calling AI model. Return only tool calls inside <tool_call> tags. <tools>[{"type":"function","function":{"name":"create_purchase_order","description":"Create a purchase order.","parameters":{"type":"object","properties":{"vendor_id":{"type":"string"},"items":{"type":"array","items":{"type":"object","properties":{"sku":{"type":"string"},"quantity":{"type":"integer"}},"required":["sku","quantity"]}},"ship_to":{"type":"string"},"needed_by":{"type":"string"}},"required":["vendor_id","items","ship_to","needed_by"]}}}]</tools>
Create a purchase order for vendor VEND-77 with 12 units of FILTER-9 and 4 units of BELT-2, ship to Plant 3, needed by 2026-06-18.
<tool_call>{"name":"create_purchase_order","arguments":{"vendor_id":"VEND-77","items":[{"sku":"FILTER-9","quantity":12}]}}</tool_call>
That left out BELT-2 plus the shipping and needed-by fields. Re-issue only the corrected purchase order tool call.

Create a weather alert for Hunter Valley when wind exceeds 80 kph or rain exceeds 60 mm, and send it to sms and email.
<tool_call>{"name":"create_weather_alert","arguments":{"region":"Hunter Valley","thresholds":{"wind_kph":80}}}</tool_call>
Correct it with both thresholds and both channels. Return only the fixed tool call.
